rules: Headlines (H1/H2) MUST use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Overlines MUST be uppercase, text-xs, tracking-[0.2em].
Do NOT exceed text-6xl for Hero headings. Use fluid typography clamping if possible.
Import fonts from Google Fonts in index.css or via next/font if applicable (but since this is Vite/React, use Google Fonts in index.html).

spacing_and_layout.global_spacing: Use p-6 to p-8 generously on cards to create breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Grid layout: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with tight gap-4 or gap-6 for control room feel.
spacing_and_layout.landing_grid: Tetris grid: Asymmetrical wide gaps gap-8 to gap-12.

surface_strategies.name: Retro-Futurism Glow
surface_strategies.usage: AI Scorecards, Primary Action Cards, Team Match Cards
surface_strategies.classes: bg-[#141428] border border-[#6C63FF]/30 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(108,99,255,0.15)] hover:border-[#6C63FF]/80 transition-all duration-300

hero_background.description: Abstract glowing purple diamond grid on dark background, use with bg-[#0D0D1A]/70 overlay for text contrast.

ai_matching_background.description: Vibrant abstract light painting with flowing neon glows, perfect for AI chat background or onboarding wizard.

team_collaboration_1.description: Group of startup founders collaborating. Use in Landing page features.

team_collaboration_2.description: Two smiling founders looking at a MacBook. Use for AI co-founder or profile placeholder.

icons.usage: Use Phosphor icons (Duotone or Regular weight) for a high-end, clean tech appearance.

animation_guidelines: Hover states: Subtle scaling (scale-[1.02]) and border color shifts on interactive cards.
Page transitions: Use Framer Motion for staggered fade-in-up on dashboard grids and Kanban items.
Marquee: Use slow moving text marquees for 'Disciplines' (Engineering, Design, Business) on the landing page.
accessibility: Ensure contrast ratio of 4.5:1 for normal text.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='create-project-btn').
Use focus-visible rings with electric purple: focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#6C63FF] focus-visible:outline-none
instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use @phosphor-icons/react instead of lucide-react where possible for a distinct look.
Use Shadcn UI for dashboard components, heavily customizing them to match the dark navy and electric purple theme. Disable pure white backgrounds on Shadcn defaults.
For the Landing Page, construct custom HTML/Tailwind sections to create overlapping, asymmetrical bento grids.
Dashboard should be dense and data-rich. Use Recharts for the Readiness Radar Chart and Team Health Gauges.
Incorporate the domain colors (#3B82F6, #EC4899, #10B981) as bright neon accents to differentiate project roles in tags, avatars, and chart data points.
Implement the Kanban board using standard drag-and-drop libraries or just stylized columns if drag-and-drop is too complex, ensuring it fits the 'flat dashboard cards' style.
NEVER use placeholder images from dummyimage.com; ONLY use the images provided in this JSON.
Ensure all components are thoroughly customized for the 'Electric & Neon' archetype.
